info.title: FlowCyt Panel API
info.description: Hybrid AI tool for multi-color flow cytometry panel design.

post.description: Create a new quality issue and trigger projection update.

Look up candidate antibody matches from inventory.

Simple heuristic: filter inventory by marker and fluorochrome,
rank by exactness of match.
Confirm a candidate entity selection for a quality issue.

Authenticate admin with a single password.

Compares the provided password against the ``ADMIN_PASSWORD`` environment
variable using ``hmac.compare_digest`` (timing-safe).  On success, sets
session data ``{"is_admin": True, "login_at": <timestamp>}``.

Returns 401 on mismatch without setting any cookie.

schema.title: Response Logout Api V1 Admin Auth Logout Post

get.description:
Return current admin authentication status.

This endpoint is exempt from the ``require_admin_session`` dependency
so it can report ``authenticated: false`` instead of returning 401.
Get a single quality issue by ID.
List quality issues, optionally filtered by status.

schema.title: Response List Issues Api V1 Admin Quality Registry Issues Get

get.description: Get audit history for a quality issue.

schema.title: Response Get History Api V1 Admin Quality Registry Issues  Issue Id  History Get

get.description: List all issues in pending_review status.

schema.title: Response Review Queue Api V1 Admin Quality Registry Review Queue Get

AuditEvent.title: AuditEvent
AuditEvent.description: Immutable record of a single mutation on a quality issue.

CandidateConfirmWithIssue.title: CandidateConfirmWithIssue
CandidateConfirmWithIssue.description: Confirm a candidate entity selection for a specific issue.

CandidateLookupRequest.title: CandidateLookupRequest
CandidateLookupRequest.description: Request to look up candidate antibody matches.

CandidateMatch.title: CandidateMatch
CandidateMatch.description: A single candidate match from the lookup.

EntityKey.title: EntityKey
EntityKey.description:
Canonical identity for a specific antibody reagent.

Equality & hashing are based on the 5 required fields.
``lot_number`` is tracked as metadata but is NOT part of identity.

FeedbackKey.title: FeedbackKey
FeedbackKey.description:
Identity key for a quality-feedback submission.

Equality & hashing are based on all non-None fields, so two submissions
that differ only in clone (where one has clone=None) are *not* equal.

LlmSettingsUpdate.title: LlmSettingsUpdate
LlmSettingsUpdate.description:
Request model for PUT /api/v1/settings/llm.

All fields are optional — omitted fields keep their current value.
Sending ``api_key: ""`` clears the stored key.

LoginResponse.title: LoginResponse
LoginResponse.description: Response body for successful admin login.

QualityIssueCreate.title: QualityIssueCreate
QualityIssueCreate.description: Payload for submitting a new quality issue.

QualityIssueResponse.title: QualityIssueResponse
QualityIssueResponse.description: Full representation of a persisted quality issue.

QualityIssueUpdate.title: QualityIssueUpdate
QualityIssueUpdate.description:
Payload for editing an existing quality issue.

Only ``issue_text`` and ``reported_by`` may be changed.
``feedback_key``, ``entity_key``, and ``status`` are immutable via this schema.

ReviewItemResponse.title: ReviewItemResponse
ReviewItemResponse.description: A quality issue queued for manual review.

SessionResponse.title: SessionResponse
SessionResponse.description: Response body for session status check.

fluorochromes.title: Fluorochromes
fluorochromes.description: List of fluorochrome names to render emission spectra for.

warnings.title: Warnings
warnings.description: Fluorochrome names that were not found in spectral_data.json.
